EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The build configuration {object.fullpath} is edited on host {event_src.host}

The build configuration {object.fullpath} is created from a template on host {event_src.host}
The build configuration {object.fullpath} is copied on host {event_src.host}
The build configuration {object.fullpath} is moved on host {event_src.host}
The build configuration {object.fullpath} is created on host {event_src.host}
The build configuration {object.fullpath} is removed on host {event_src.host}
The build configuration {object.fullpath} is disabled on host {event_src.host}
